name: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B
note: Apache-2.0 coding flagship; Instruct sibling rivals GPT-4o on EvalPlus/LiveCodeBench/BigCodeBench and Aider code-repair.
tpsNote: ~20GB Q4 fits within 24GB with limited headroom for context/KV cache; no single independently verified 4090 tok/s figure found.

results.notes: BigCodeBench-Complete, Full split, base model; corrected from 83 (the MBPP column mis-transposed) per arXiv:2409.12186v3 Table 5.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real; blog qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2.5-coder-family/ byline gives Nov 12 2024 and Apache-2.0 for 32B. HF card (huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B) confirms 32.5B total/31.0B non-embedding params, 64 layers, GQA 40Q/8KV, 131,072 ctx. Qwen2.5-Coder Technical Report (arxiv 2409.12186, updated v3 Nov 12 2024 to add the 32B size) Table 5 confirms base-model HumanEval 65.9, MBPP 76.4 (MBPP+ is a separate 53.6), BigCodeBench-Complete-Full 83.0 -- all three result rows verified verbatim (an initial fetch pass mis-transposed columns; a second, targeted fetch separating base vs instruct rows corrected this and matched the input exactly). No changes made.
